name: Ashbound Expanse
short_description: This is an accessible, fast-paced third-person shooter that blends roguelike elements with a nature-inspired visual style.
reasons: 最優先ジャンル: Third-Person Shooter +50
成長/積み上げ要素: Roguelike +10
現在プレイヤー1人以上 +2

name: Abyss Kitchen
short_description: Abyss Kitchen is a survival action game in which you play the role of Lop a cook who accompanies a party of adventurers, and guides them with the power of food. Feed yourself in the dungeon and eat whatever you can to keep from starving and falling down. Eat up anything that stands in your way!
reasons: 現在プレイヤー100人以上 +8

name: An Eggstremely Hard Game
short_description: As highly qualified goose parents, work together to bring your little egg home safely. Every crack makes it harder to control, every mistake more hilarious. A co-op physics game for 2 or 4 players about teamwork, clumsiness and honking. HONK!
reasons: 現在プレイヤー100人以上 +8

name: Limitless Survivor
short_description: Incremental roguelite with infinite progression. Collect powerful artifacts, gather crystals, and scale your stats to absurd levels. Let auto-play handle the grind anytime—even while you're away.
reasons: 成長/積み上げ要素: Progression +20
成長/積み上げ要素: Roguelite +10
現在プレイヤー500人以上 +10

name: The Alley
short_description: A first-person psychological horror game. Explore a maze-like alleyway, using your camera to distinguish between supernatural "Aberrations" and deceptive "Deceptions" while escaping the relentless pursuit of a vengeful ghost.
reasons: 現在プレイヤー10人以上 +5

name: Some of You May Die
short_description: Some of You May Die is a strategic autobattler where you can upgrade everything! Gather a team of heroes to embark on a singleplayer journey or go head to head with other players in online PvP!
reasons: 現在プレイヤー10人以上 +5

name: 侠影录
short_description: "Legacy of Shadows" is a Wuxia roguelite. From avenging your fallen sect to unraveling the "Eternal Dragon" conspiracy, master fluid builds to cut through a world of intrigue and shatter the eternal scheme.
reasons: 成長/積み上げ要素: Roguelite +10
現在プレイヤー500人以上 +10

name: 命运&通胀 -Fate&Inflation-
short_description: Fate & Inflation is a game that combines RPG roguelite elements with card building mechanics. Embark on a mysterious and unknown journey of fate, constantly strengthening yourself, and experience the thrilling charm of exponential combat power growth!
reasons: 成長/積み上げ要素: RPG +10
成長/積み上げ要素: Roguelite +10

name: Boba Cafe Simulator
short_description: You’re reborn—back at the beginning of your startup journey. In your last life, poor management led to your shop being crushed by competitors. This time, the sweet scent of condensed milk runs through your veins, and you’re set on one goal: turn “Sugarville” into the top name in the industry.
reasons: 現在プレイヤー500人以上 +10

name: Mammon’s Wager
short_description: Mammon’s Wager is a narrative puzzle game blending psychological horror with resource management. Wager your remaining life at the demon's machine. When funds run low, choose to pawn memories, emotions, or organs. Every exchange weighs human value. For rebirth, how much of your "self" will you pay?
reasons: 現在プレイヤー1人以上 +2

name: Mall Together
short_description: Run your mall. Open new stores, sign contracts with leading brands, hire teammates, and meet customer needs. Play with friends or go solo, and enjoy the growth of your mall.
reasons: 現在プレイヤー500人以上 +10

name: 我的美味丈夫 My Tasty Husband
short_description: Murders quietly upend May's life. A strange husband, a reckless courier, a dutiful officer—reality and hallucination blur together. In this narrative adventure of food, intimacy, and death, make choices as May and reach her ending. If she can still tell what she's eaten from what she's loved...
reasons: 現在プレイヤー500人以上 +10

name: Razor Trail Survivors
short_description: A semi-idle survival strategy set in a persistent post-apocalyptic wasteland. Recruit survivors, gather resources and craft equipment, seize territory and build your base — and fight other players if you choose. One account across desktop, web, and mobile.
reasons: 現在プレイヤー1人以上 +2

name: Hex Clash - The Fractured Combs
short_description: Command your swarm in Hex Clash: The Fractured Combs! In this turn-based strategic multiplayer game, face 5 Legendary Queens across Planet Hexanor. Farm Nectar, convert it to Pollen, Honey, and Stars to unlock epic cosmetics from Colony Chests. Unleash magical skills and rule the hex grid!

name: The Dungeon of Lulu Farea: Rebirth
short_description: Rumored gateway to the Underworld, Lulu Farea is riddled with monsters. Join Cruellus on his journey to befriend them all!
reasons: 現在プレイヤー10人以上 +5

name: 宗门最后的长老
short_description: Sect master gone, demons invade, elders fallen—only you in seclusion. They don't know you've trained a millennium. Merge synthesis with tower-defense. Battle Shan Hai Jing beasts in ink-wash art. Combine skills, treasures, weapons to power up. Wield flying sword, blast endless hordes. Easy,
reasons: 現在プレイヤー10人以上 +5

name: KAZUMA KANEKO'S TSUKUYOMI
reasons: 現在プレイヤー10人以上 +5

name: Godfall: Embers
short_description: [Godfall: Embers]The divine fire has fallen,You must embark on a perilous journey to uncover the truth behind the fallen divine flame, challenge forgotten myths, and fight to restore the world before everything is consumed by darkness.
reasons: 現在プレイヤー10人以上 +5

name: Sinheritance
short_description: Sinheritance is a terrifying and mind-bending puzzle game. Explore every corner in an intensely oppressive atmosphere to piece together a chilling story. Every step must be taken with caution, for the deepest fears often stem from your own choices and your gradually crumbling sanity.
reasons: 現在プレイヤー1人以上 +2

name: Two Sided Love
short_description: What is the biggest variable in a relationship? Is it "him"? Or is it the "him in her heart"? May this little story serve as a blade, dissecting the "possessiveness" and "desire to control" in a relationship. What exactly gives rise to them?
reasons: 現在プレイヤー1人以上 +2

name: ePaperCraft SHIRYU
short_description: Design paper craft models on your PC, unfold them into printable templates, and build your own creations with scissors, glue, and paper. Includes 70+ ready-to-build models.

name: 黑山羊BlackGoat
short_description: The game is a BL Cthulhu-style narrative romance game. It tells the story of the protagonist struggling to survive on a cruise ship filled with strange events after losing their memory. The game's setting is modern with a Cthulhu-inspired narrative.
reasons: 現在プレイヤー1人以上 +2

name: 侠影录-支持者包
short_description: 此DLC需要在拥有 侠影录 的基础上才能畅玩

name: Soul Monsters: The Machine Kingdom and the Lich Queen
short_description: A story-driven roguelike deckbuilder set in the war between the Machine Kingdom and the Lich Queen. Build your deck, gather relics, and battle through 75 stages to uncover the truth binding four intertwined destinies.
reasons: 成長/積み上げ要素: Roguelike +10

name: 3D Print Designer
short_description: Create, edit, and prepare 3D models for printing. Design with intuitive CAD tools, import models, customize objects, and export to STL or OBJ. Perfect for makers, hobbyists, students, and professionals.

name: Tulip Season
short_description: Tulip Season is an incremental farming sim built from small, satisfying routines. Beauty has a number, and you make it go up. Unlock new tulips and field upgrades, breed new colours, and help out when the neighbours come by.

name: The Afterlife Cafe
short_description: Travel to the world of the dead, whose stories encourage reflection on life. Chat with spirits, brew drinks to suit your mood, and bond with the people who run the afterlife cafes. In this urban sci-fi fantasy visual novel, your choices impact the living, the departed, and your own path forward.

name: Address Direct and Union Search
short_description: Direct URL access and multi‑engine search in one lightweight tool. Type any URL to open directly – no unwanted searching. Use separate search boxes per engine, or check multiple for union search. Customize engines, switch browsers, history sorted by frequency, password protection.

name: Matting Tsar
short_description: High-performance deep learning image matting tool. Drag & drop to remove background in one click; supports rectangular and free lasso selections for local fine matting; integrates with Windows context menu for silent one-click matting or import for local editing. Simple, efficient, high-quality.

name: Frontline: Operation Kosmonaut
short_description: 1987 A rogue faction has seized control of a classified Soviet orbital facility. As a Spetsnaz operative, reclaim the base, eliminate traitors, and secure the Kosmonaut program.
